      From preventive care to cosmetic dentistry – we're your complete oral health solution. 📅 Book Consultation 📞 Call: +91-82879 90074 15000+ Happy Patients 17+ Years Experience 5★ Patient Rating 👨‍⚕️ Experienced Doctor 17+ years of expertise in advanced dental care 📅 Book Appointment Easy online booking with flexible scheduling 🛡️ Regular Checkup Preventive care to maintain your oral health 📍 Our Location Conveniently located in Sector 24, Rohini Are You Struggling With These Common Dental Concerns? Many families in Rohini face these frustrating dental challenges every day… Dental Pain & Emergencies Sudden toothaches disrupting your daily life and work Expensive Treatment Quotes Getting shocked by high costs at other dental clinics Fear & Anxiety Your family avoiding dentist visits due to past bad experiences Long Wait Times Struggling to get appointments when you actually need them One-Size-Fits-All Care Clinics that don't understand different needs of kids vs adults Unclear Treatment Plans Never knowing what to expect or how much treatments will cost Meet Dr. Gajendra Bansal - Your Trusted Dental Guide With over 17 years of experience serving families in Rohini, we understand exactly what you're going through – and more importantly, how to fix it. 15000+ Happy Patients 17+ Years Experience 5★ Google Rating 2011 Established Since Why Families Choose Us: Gentle, painless treatments using latest technology Transparent pricing with no hidden costs Family-friendly environment that kids actually enjoy Same-day appointments for emergencies Personalized care plans for every family member Dr. Gajendra Bansal BDS, Certified Implantologist ★★★★★ "Every smile tells a story. Our job is to make sure it's a happy one." Our Simple 3-Step Process to Your Perfect Smile No complicated procedures. No surprises. Just a clear path to better dental health. 📅 01 Book Your Visit Schedule your free consultation online or call us. We'll fit you in within 24–48 hours. 🛡️ 02 Get Your Assessment Comprehensive examination with digital X-rays and personalized treatment plan with clear pricing. ✔️ 03 Start Your Treatment Begin your painless treatment journey with our gentle, modern techniques and caring team. Start Your Smile Journey Today → Complete Dental Care for Your Entire Family From routine cleanings to complete smile makeovers – we've got you covered. General & Preventive Care Comprehensive dental care to prevent problems before they start, keeping your smile healthy for life. Regular Check-ups Professional Cleaning Digital X-rays Fluoride Therapy Learn More → Restorative Dentistry Restore damaged teeth to their natural function and appearance with our advanced restorative treatments. Painless Root Canal Crowns & Bridges Tooth-colored Fillings Complete Dentures Learn More → Cosmetic Dentistry Transform your smile with our aesthetic dental treatments designed to boost your confidence. Teeth Whitening Porcelain Veneers Smile Makeovers Composite Bonding Learn More → Orthodontic Treatment Straighten your teeth and correct bite issues with our modern orthodontic solutions. Metal & Clear Braces Invisalign Treatment Clear Aligners Retainers & Follow-up Learn More → Oral Surgery & Implants Advanced surgical procedures and dental implants to restore your smile and oral health. Dental Implants Wisdom Tooth Removal Oral Surgery Bone Grafting Learn More → Family & Kids Dentistry Gentle, specialized care for patients of all ages in a warm, family-friendly environment. Pediatric Dentistry Family Treatment Plans Gentle Techniques Oral Health Education Learn More → Special Services & Advanced Care Hair & Skin PRP Wart/Skin Tag Removal Earlobe Repair Digital Smile Analysis Imagine Your Life With Perfect Dental Health Here's what our happy families are experiencing every day... ✔️ Confident Smiles Your family smiles freely, knowing their teeth look and feel amazing ✔️ Pain-Free Living No more sleepless nights from toothaches or dental emergencies ✔️ Family Bonding Enjoying meals together without dental discomfort or embarrassment What Our Happy Patients Say Real stories from families we've helped achieve their perfect smiles. ❝ "Dr. Bansal and his team are amazing! My root canal was completely painless and the entire process was explained clearly. The clinic is very clean and modern. Highly recommend for families in Rohini." ★★★★★ Rajesh Kumar ❝ "Best dental clinic in Rohini! Dr. Bansal is very gentle with kids. My 7-year-old daughter actually looks forward to dental visits now. The staff is friendly and professional." ★★★★★ Priya Sharma ❝ "Excellent cosmetic dentistry work. Got my teeth whitening and some composite bonding done. Results are fantastic and the pricing was very reasonable compared to other clinics." ★★★★★ Amit Singh ❝ "Emergency dental care at its best. Had severe tooth pain on Sunday and Dr. Bansal opened the clinic specially for me. The treatment was quick and effective. Very grateful!" ★★★★★ Sunita Gupta ❝ "Professional and caring dental care. The digital X-rays and modern equipment give confidence. Dr. Bansal explains everything clearly and the treatment plans are transparent." ★★★★★ Vikram Mehta ← → Frequently Asked Questions Get answers to common questions about dental care and our services. How often should I visit the dentist for regular checkups? We recommend visiting every 6 months for preventive care and to catch issues early. Do you accept dental insurance or offer payment plans? Yes, we accept most insurance providers and also provide flexible payment plans. Are your dental treatments really painless? We use advanced technology and gentle techniques to ensure pain-free treatments for patients of all ages. When should I take my child to the dentist for the first time? Children should have their first dental visit by the age of 1 or within 6 months after their first tooth appears. Do you provide painless dental treatment for kids and adults? Yes, our clinic specializes in gentle and painless treatments for both children and adults.
